name: Soft-Stub Migration and Diagnostics
scope_summary: Modify the `stub!` macro in `glyim_diag/src/lib.rs` to expand to `unimplemented!()` instead of `compile_error!()`, and add a companion `stub_impl!` macro that also expands to `unimplemented!()`. Implement all `GlyimDiagnostic` constructors (`lex_error`, `parse_error`, `type_error`, `borrow_error`, `internal_error`), `with_source_code`, `with_sub`, `with_suggestion`, `DiagSink` methods (`emit`, `has_errors`, `into_diagnostics`), and `Display`/`Error` implementations. Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls within `glyim-diag`, replacing them with functional diagnostic creation and reporting logic.

tests.S01-T01: Workspace compiles successfully after macro change
tests.S01-T02: Count of stub!() calls remains unchanged across workspace
tests.S01-T03: Calling a stubbed function at runtime panics with unimplemented!
tests.S01-T04: GlyimDiagnostic builders create correct severity and code
tests.S01-T05: DiagSink respects error limit and calls on_emit callback

mocking: No mocking. Direct macro definition change and structural testing.

name: Foundation Core Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-core`. Implement `Interner::intern/resolve/lookup`, `Idx<T>` conversions, `define_idx` macro internals, `Path::from_single/as_name`, `validate_alignment`, and `TargetInfo` constructors. Ensure all primitive types, def-id structures, and arena allocations are fully operational.

tests.S02-T01: Interner correctly interns and resolves symbols
tests.S02-T02: define_idx macro generates valid IdxLike implementations
tests.S02-T04: validate_alignment accepts valid and rejects invalid alignments

mocking: No mocking. Direct unit testing of core data structures.

name: Language Library Verification
scope_summary: Verify and unstub `glyim-lang-core`, `glyim-lang-std`, and `glyim-lang-alloc`. Ensure `core_source()`, `core_modules()`, `core_source_all()` (and std/alloc equivalents) are fully implemented and return valid Glyim source strings for the compiler's core library injection. Replace any `stub!()` calls with static string returns.

tests.S03-T01: core_source returns valid source for known modules
tests.S03-T02: std_source_all concatenates all std modules correctly

name: Span & Hygiene Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-span`. Implement `SyntaxContext` operations, `ExpnId` logic, `HygieneCtx::push_expansion/apply_mark/remove_mark/adjust`, and `Span` methods (`is_dummy`, `range`, `sans_ctx`). Ensure `ByteIdx` and `FileId` conversions are fully functional and `From<Span> for miette::SourceSpan` works.

tests.S04-T01: Span::new creates valid span, is_dummy checks work
tests.S04-T03: ExpnId::ROOT and SyntaxContext::ROOT are valid defaults

name: Syntax & AST Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-syntax`. Fully implement the exhaustive `SyntaxKind` enum and `try_from_raw`, `GlyimLang` rowan implementation, `AstNode` for all node types (`SourceFile`, `FnDef`, `StructDef`, etc.), and `child_of_kind` utility.

tests.S05-T01: SyntaxKind try_from_raw maps all raw kinds correctly
tests.S05-T02: AstNode::cast and can_cast work for all definitions

mocking: No mocking. Rowan tree construction testing.

name: Runtime FFI Verification
scope_summary: Verify and unstub `glyim-runtime`. Ensure `glyim_alloc`, `glyim_dealloc`, `glyim_drop_in_place`, and `glyim_panic` are correctly implemented unsafe FFI functions. Verify alignment handling in alloc/dealloc.
mocking: No mocking. Integration tests via Mir interpreter.

name: Virtual File System Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-vfs`. Implement `add_file_from_disk`, `add_file_content`, `set_file_content`, `file_content_ref`, and `file_id` lookups in the `Vfs` struct.

tests.S07-T02: Vfs file_id returns correct FileId for known paths

mocking: No mocking. Standard IO testing for VFS.

name: Frontend Lexer & Parser Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-frontend`. Implement full `lex()` logic producing `Token` streams. Implement all sub-parsers (`parse_expr`, `parse_item`, `parse_pat`, `parse_stmt`, `parse_ty`) with error recovery, building valid Rowan `GreenNode` trees for `ParseResult`.

tests.S08-T01: Lexer tokenizes complex programs without panic
tests.S08-T02: Parser constructs valid CST for fn definitions and expressions
tests.S08-T03: Parser error recovery inserts Error nodes and continues
tests.S08-T04: Snapshots of CST for test programs remain stable

name: HIR Lowering Unstubbing
scope_summary: Exhaustively match all `Expr`, `BinOp`, `Pat`, and `TypeRef` variants in the HIR lower module, removing all catch-all match arms that produce `Pat::Err` or `Expr::Err`. Implement field name resolution using struct definition order. Support bodyless FnDef for foreign functions instead of panicking. Change the `lower_crate_for_pipeline` signature to return `(CrateHir, Vec<GlyimDiagnostic>)` instead of just `CrateHir` to capture diagnostics during lowering.

tests.S09-T01: lower_expr handles all Expr variants without panic
tests.S09-T02: lower_pat handles Struct, Tuple, Or patterns
tests.S09-T03: Foreign fn without body lowers to FnItem with body: None
tests.S09-T04: Field names are correctly preserved in HIR struct expressions

mocking: Use `glyim_test::snapshot_cst` and `assert_ty` to verify HIR output.

name: Def-Map & Name Resolution Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-def-map`. Implement `build_def_map` to walk AST, build `ModuleData` tree, `ItemScope::declare`, `Resolver::resolve_path`, visibility checking, and `ModuleOrigin` tracking. Change the `build_def_map` signature to accept an `&Interner` parameter for symbol resolution.

tests.S10-T02: Resolver::resolve_path finds items in parent modules
tests.S10-T03: Visibility checks prevent access to private items

name: Macro Expansion Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-meta`. Implement `Expander::new`, `register_macro`, `expand`, and `expand_crate`. Build the declarative macro matcher, substitution engine, and token tree manipulation. Implement built-in macro handlers (`file!`, `line!`, `column!`, `include!`, `env!`).

tests.S11-T01: Declarative macro matches and substitutes correctly
tests.S11-T02: Built-in file! and line! macros expand to correct values
tests.S11-T03: expand_crate processes multiple macro calls in sequence

name: Type System Core & Extensions
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-type`. Implement all `TyCtxMut`/`TyCtx` methods (`alloc_ty`, `mk_ty`, `mk_ref`, `mk_adt`, `intern_substitution`, `register_adt`, `adt_def`, etc.). Implement `compute_flags`, `PrintTy`/`DebugTy`, `Binder` operations, auto-trait computation, and object safety checking. Add `register_fn_sig`, `fn_sig`, `register_closure_sig`, `closure_sig`, `register_body_ty`, and `body_ty` methods to `TyCtxMut`/`TyCtx`. Extend the `TypeLookup` trait with `adt_def` and `field_ty` methods containing default implementations returning `None` or `error_ty` so existing trait implementors do not break.

tests.S12-T01: TyCtxMut creates and interns types correctly
tests.S12-T02: TypeLookup::field_ty resolves ADT fields via default impl
tests.S12-T03: Auto trait computation identifies Send/Sync correctly
tests.S12-T04: Object safety checks reject self-types correctly

name: MIR Definitions & Place Typing
scope_summary: Remove all `unimplemented!()` panics in `glyim-mir`, specifically in `Place::ty`. Implement `Place::ty` for ADT field projection, downcasts, derefs, and indexing using the `TypeLookup::field_ty` and `TypeLookup::adt_def` methods. Ensure `Body::dummy`, `Place::new`, `BasicBlockData::new`, `SwitchTargets`, and `from_raw`/`to_raw` conversions are fully unstubbed and functional.

tests.S13-T01: Place::ty resolves through Deref and Field projections
tests.S13-T02: Place::ty resolves Downcast to correct variant type

name: Trait Solver & Inference Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all stubs in `glyim-solve`. Implement depth limit cycle detection in `resolve_ty_shallow_depth` emitting a diagnostic on infinite type cycles instead of returning the original type. Implement `Coerce` predicate evaluation for subtyping and unsizing instead of returning `Ambiguous`. Add `InferenceSnapshot` struct and `snapshot`, `rollback_to`, and `commit` methods to `InferenceTable` for speculative unification. Fully implement `SimpleTraitSolver` and `FulfillmentCtx`.

tests.S14-T02: resolve_ty_shallow_depth emits diagnostic on infinite type cycle
tests.S14-T03: Coerce predicate evaluates to Proven for unsizing
tests.S14-T04: FulfillmentCtx processes trait obligations to completion

name: Layout Computation Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-layout`. Implement `SimpleLayoutComputer::layout_of/fn_abi_of`, `Layout::scalar/unit`, `Size`/`Align` arithmetic, `FieldsShape`/`VariantsShape`/`TagEncoding` computation, and VTable layout with `VTableComputer` trait.

tests.S15-T01: layout_of computes correct size/align for structs
tests.S15-T02: layout_of computes niche encoding for enums
tests.S15-T03: fn_abi_of respects SystemV and AAPCS calling conventions

name: Type Checker Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `STUB:` warnings and catch-all arms in `glyim-typeck`. Implement `MethodCall` resolution via trait/impl lookup. Exhaustively handle all pattern kinds and type annotations, removing catch-all match arms. Implement multi-segment type paths via `Resolver`. Implement fn signature instantiation by replacing bound vars with inference variables instead of returning a fresh inference variable. Add `expr_ty`, `pat_ty`, and `adjustments` accessors to `TypeckResult`.

tests.S16-T01: Method calls resolve to trait impls correctly
tests.S16-T02: Multi-segment paths resolve across module boundaries
tests.S16-T03: Fn signature instantiation substitutes bound regions
tests.S16-T05: Exhaustive pattern/type matching eliminates catch-all panics

name: Borrow Checker Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `STUB:` warnings in `glyim-borrowck`. Complete `check_borrows` implementation: liveness analysis, move analysis, two-phase borrow analysis (reservation vs. activated), conflict detection, and move-error reporting.

tests.S17-T02: Allows shared borrows in two-phase reservation
tests.S17-T04: Allows disjoint partial moves of struct fields

name: MIR Optimizer Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-opt`. Implement `optimize`: CFG simplification (merging blocks), constant propagation, dead code elimination (removing unused assignments), and unreachable block elimination.

name: MIR Interpreter Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `STUB:` warnings in `glyim-mir-interp`. Implement discriminant evaluation extracting enum tags and handling niche encoding instead of returning 0. Implement `Len` evaluation for arrays/slices instead of erroring on non-integer lengths. Complete all missing `BinOp` variants (`BitAnd`, `Or`, `Xor`, `Shl`, `Shr` for ints, `And`, `Or` for bools, comparisons for all). Implement recursive projection chain for nested place writes (Deref+Field).

tests.S19-T01: Discriminant of enum returns correct variant index
tests.S19-T02: Len evaluates array length from const generic
tests.S19-T03: Binary bitwise ops execute correctly on integers
tests.S19-T04: Write through Deref+Field projection updates nested value

name: THIR to MIR Lowering Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `STUB:` warnings in `glyim-lower`. Exhaustively handle all `ExprKind` variants removing catch-all arms. Implement field name resolution by extending the `LowerCtx` trait with `field_index_by_name` and `variant_index_by_name` methods. Implement tuple, struct, and or-pattern destructuring with `Deinit`. Implement expression side-effects evaluation, string and char literal lowering, closure and fnref handling, match guard evaluation, and all place expression kinds. Extend the `LowerCtx` trait with `fn_sig` and `const_value` methods.

tests.S20-T01: Field access lowers to correct FieldIdx projection
tests.S20-T02: Let-stmt with struct pattern destructures correctly
tests.S20-T03: Match guard evaluates before arm body
tests.S20-T06: Place expressions generate valid projection chains

name: Bytecode Backend Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `STUB:` warnings in `glyim-codegen`. Implement `Assign` with projections by computing target address offset. Implement `Rvalue::Ref` with projection and projected Operands. Support `String`, `Fn`, and `ConstRef` constant kinds via allocation tables. Implement `Assert` terminator with conditional branching to cleanup/panic, and `Drop` terminator with projection via drop glue lookup.

tests.S21-T01: Assign with field projection writes to correct offset
tests.S21-T03: Drop calls glyim_drop_in_place via computed place
tests.S21-T04: Assert branches to panic on failure
tests.S21-T05: String constant emits to string table
tests.S21-T06: Fn constant emits to function pointer

mocking: Bytecode backend is self-contained; test via `glyim_codegen::BytecodeBackend::generate_function`.

name: LLVM Backend Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `STUB:` warnings in `glyim-codegen-llvm`. Map all `TyKinds` to proper LLVM types (error->i64, floats->f32/f64, aggregates->structs/arrays). Implement `lower_aggregate` for ADTs/closures, `lower_len`, `lower_repeat`. Implement string constant lowering via global string pointer, function constant lowering via function pointer, and const ref lowering via global address. Implement `Deref` on non-pointer, `Field` projection on non-aggregate using `adt_def`, `Index` projection on non-array/slice, `Len` with non-integer count, logical `Not` on float (emit trap), `Deref` on float (emit trap), `Repeat` with non-integer count, `Assert` terminator, and unhandled `PassMode` arguments (`Indirect`, `Cast`, `HomogeneousAggregate`, `Split`, `Ignore`) per ABI rules.

tests.S22-T01: Struct type lowered to LLVM struct
tests.S22-T02: String constant lowered to global string pointer
tests.S22-T03: Field projection on struct computes correct GEP
tests.S22-T04: Assert terminator emits comparison and conditional branch
tests.S22-T05: Unhandled PassMode arguments are passed correctly per ABI

mocking: Use real MIR from pipeline, compile to LLVM IR, run with lli to verify.

name: Compiler Database Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `stub!()` and `stub_impl!()` calls in `glyim-db`. Implement `Database::new`, `interner`, `vfs`, `set_ty_ctx`, `ty_ctx`, `intern_mut`, `set_mono_cache`, `mono_cache` using `parking_lot::RwLock` interior mutability.

tests.S23-T01: Database stores and retrieves TyCtx correctly
tests.S23-T02: Database stores and retrieves Interner mutably
tests.S23-T03: Database Vfs returns correct file contents

name: Compilation Pipeline Unstubbing
scope_summary: Remove all `STUB:` warnings in `glyim-pipeline`. Implement generic instantiation by cloning MIR body and replacing `ParamTy`/`ParamConst`/`EarlyBoundRegion` with concrete args from `Substitution`. Change missing MIR body fallback to return a compilation error instead of a dummy body. Implement drop glue generation by walking type fields and emitting `Drop` terminators; add a `DropGlueProvider` trait and implement it. Fix ADT field type resolution in `pipeline_context` to use `TyCtx::adt_def` instead of error types.

tests.S24-T01: Generic function instantiation substitutes type parameters
tests.S24-T02: Missing MIR body emits internal error diagnostic
tests.S24-T03: Drop glue generated for struct with Drop field
tests.S24-T04: ADT field types resolve correctly instead of erroring
